g.text: LLM agents auto-discover sources, generate connectors, handle schema drift
Text-to-SQL, natural language pipelines, auto-generated dbt models
Still need Iceberg, warehouses, object storage — LLMs don't replace infra
Chat-based analytics, auto-generated dashboards, "ask your data"
LLMs become the semantic layer — understand context without rigid models
Auto-classify PII, generate documentation, explain lineage in plain English
LLMs orchestrate ML pipelines, generate features, explain model outputs
Anomaly detection, policy generation, but humans still own access control
Terraform, K8s stay — LLMs help write IaC, not replace it
Root cause analysis, anomaly explanation, auto-fix suggestions
